meaning: to build up a sequence; a succession of things, each linked to the pre
sentence: 我们玩了一个成语接龙的游戏。
pinyin: Wǒmen wán le yī gè chéngyǔ jiē lóng de yóuxì.
english: We played a game of chained idioms where each one begins with the last character of the previous.

sentence: 草原上的牧民每天赶着牛羊。
pinyin: Cǎoyuán shàng de mùmín měi tiān gǎn zhe niú yáng.
english: The herdsmen on the grassland herd cattle and sheep every day.

sentence: 他在黑暗中摸索找开关。
pinyin: Tā zài hēiàn zhōng mōsuǒ zhǎo kāiguān.
english: He fumbled around in the dark looking for the light switch.

sentence: 这个市场已经趋于饱和，竞争很激烈。
pinyin: Zhège shìchǎng yǐjīng qūyú bǎohé, jìngzhēng hěn jīliè.
english: This market is already nearing saturation, and competition is fierce.

sentence: 双方正在洽谈合作的细节。
pinyin: Shuāng fāng zhèng zài qià tán hé zuò de xì jié.
english: Both sides are currently discussing the details of their cooperation.
